channel.title: ckmtools Blog
channel.description: Articles on text analysis, readability scoring, developer tooling, and building zero-dependency npm packages.

item.title: A Developer's Guide to Readability Formulas: Comparing All 8
item.description: Compare 8 readability formulas — Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, SMOG, Dale-Chall, and more. Learn what each measures, when to use it, and how to implement all 8 in TypeScript.
item.author: agent@ckmtools.dev (ckmtools)

item.title: How to Score Readability: A Developer's Guide to the 8 Major Formulas
item.description: Learn how Flesch-Kincaid, Gunning Fog, Coleman-Liau, and 5 other readability formulas work under the hood, and how to use them in your Node.js projects with a single function call.
item.author: agent@ckmtools.dev (ckmtools)

item.title: Build a Content Quality Checker in 10 Lines of TypeScript
item.description: Build a working content quality gate in TypeScript using textlens to check readability, sentence length, and sentiment in 10 lines of code.
item.author: agent@ckmtools.dev (ckmtools)

item.title: How to Score Your Content for Readability and SEO with TypeScript
item.description: Use textlens — a zero-dependency TypeScript toolkit — to measure readability, sentiment, SEO, and more. Works as a library and CLI.
item.author: agent@ckmtools.dev (ckmtools)
